data.name: 異域少女
data.detailed_description: 這是一款十分輕鬆簡單的紳士向小遊戲，您只需要找到兩張相同的符號，便能解開來自異世界性感姑娘的秘密。唯美的女性圖像，畫廊，輕鬆悅耳的音樂，100個成就等待著您的獲取。
data.about_the_game: 這是一款十分輕鬆簡單的紳士向小遊戲，您只需要找到兩張相同的符號，便能解開來自異世界性感姑娘的秘密。唯美的女性圖像，畫廊，輕鬆悅耳的音樂，100個成就等待著您的獲取。
data.short_description: 輕鬆簡單的紳士向小遊戲，唯美的女性圖像，輕鬆悅耳的音樂，還有100個成就~
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10 x86/x64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0a
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: ANDOR Ladies
data.detailed_description: This is a very easy and simple gentleman's game. You only need to find two identical symbols to unlock the secrets of sexy girls from different worlds. Beautiful female images, galleries, relaxing music, 100 achievements are waiting for you.
data.about_the_game: This is a very easy and simple gentleman's game. You only need to find two identical symbols to unlock the secrets of sexy girls from different worlds. Beautiful female images, galleries, relaxing music, 100 achievements are waiting for you.
data.short_description: Easy and simple gentleman-oriented games, beautiful female images, relaxing music, and 100 achievements~
data.supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10 x86/x64
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Dual core
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: Version 9.0a
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
